name: Clearsight
description:
Clearsight is an adult female dragon from NightWing tribe. She is former mate of Darkstalker, and she posses exceptionally powerful foresight and formerly served as Queen Vigilance's head seer for a short amount of time while she resided in the Night Kingdom. After imprisoning Darkstalker under Agate Mountain in order to save Pyrrhia, Clearsight decides to travel on Pantala. But she is still haunted by the ghosts of her past...
✦✦
Clearsight is deeply kind, willful, serious, and often worried and harried, Clearsight was often known to be the voice of reason towards both Darkstalker and Fathom. She was selfless and open-minded, willing to admit to her own faults as well as others'.Although Clearsight preferred compromise over confrontation, she was not afraid of conflict and would try her best to do the right thing, even in the face of danger or oppression. She wanted to be a dragon who created order from the chaos.
✦✦
Art by: meroaw
